allow: Bash(timeout 15 bash -c 'until curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; echo ""servidor ok""')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), name TEXT NOT NULL, size_bytes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, mime_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''text/plain'', chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users\(id\) ON DELETE SET NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now\(\)\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_chunks \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), document_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES documents\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE, content TEXT NOT NULL, embedding vector\(1536\), chunk_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now\(\)\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_document_chunks_embedding ON document_chunks USING ivfflat \(embedding vector_cosine_ops\) WITH \(lists = 100\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE documents ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE document_chunks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""CREATE POLICY auth_only ON documents FOR ALL USING \(auth.role\(\) = ''authenticated''\); CREATE POLICY auth_only ON document_chunks FOR ALL USING \(auth.role\(\) = ''authenticated''\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND table_name IN \(''documents'',''document_chunks''\) ORDER BY table_name""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE students ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS role TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''aluno'' CHECK \(role IN \(''aluno'',''gestor''\)\); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_students_role ON students\(role\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), phone TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, name TEXT, interest TEXT, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now\(\), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now\(\)\); ALTER TABLE leads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY auth_only ON leads FOR ALL USING \(auth.role\(\) = ''authenticated''\); CREATE TRIGGER t_leads BEFORE UPDATE ON leads FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at\(\)""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/hvvgyiafelqylbzkzjbi/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_f5e27309690e5d34e0d552c745c949b812b6b6f0" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""SELECT column_name, data_type, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = ''students'' AND column_name = ''role''""}")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total users: {len\(d[""users""]\)}''\); print\(f''Warnings: {d[""warnings""]}''\); [print\(f''  ID:{u[""id""]} | {u[""fullname""]} | phone1:{u.get\(""phone1"",""\(none\)""\)} | phone2:{u.get\(""phone2"",""\(none\)""\)} | email:{u.get\(""email"",""\(none\)""\)}''\) for u in d[''users''][:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; courses=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''ID: {c[""id""]} | {c[""shortname""]} | {c[""fullname""]}''''\) for c in courses if c[''''id''''] != 1]")
